title: App Store & Google Play Data Scraper Output
description: Structured app metadata records from Apple App Store and Google Play with app IDs, names, developers, categories, prices, ratings, versions, install ranges, screenshots, store URLs, and scraped timestamps.

results.title: App store metadata records
results.description: Clean dataset items containing non-personal public app metadata, ratings summary, pricing, version, media, country, and store URL data.
